aliases: sharp metallic foreign body in the stomach
symptom: belly pain and not much of an explanation
hook: a full pair of scissors was sitting in the stomach
whatYouSee: A complete pair of metal scissors in the stomach with the two finger loops up top and the closed blades pointing down. It is unmistakable bright white against the soft tissue.
whyItMatters: Swallowed sharp metal is a real emergency because the points can scratch tear or perforate the gut on the way through. Sharp objects in the stomach usually need to come out urgently.
treatment: Removed with an urgent endoscopy where a camera and grabber pull it out through the mouth. Surgery if it has moved past reach or already caused a tear.
takeaway: Scissors do not belong in the stomach. The points are the danger so this one comes out fast.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with belly pain and not much of an explanation.

Then the X-ray loaded 😳

What's the most likely diagnosis? 🩻

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: a swallowed pair of scissors ✂️

Yes. A full pair of scissors sitting in the stomach.

Swallowed sharp metal is a real emergency because the points can tear the gut on the way through. This usually comes out with an urgent endoscopy and sometimes surgery.

You saw it the second the X-ray loaded.
